subject: Wedding guest block rate
body: Hello, I'm attending a wedding at your hotel next month and the bride mentioned there's a group rate. Can you send me the booking link for the Wilson-Stevens wedding block? Thank you!

subject: Beach towels and chairs?
body: Quick question - do you provide beach towels and chairs for guests? We're staying APH-2416 and planning to spend time at the beach. Thanks!

subject: Spa services and pricing
body: Do you have a spa? I'm staying APH-2406 and would love to book a massage. Can you send me the spa menu and pricing? Also, what are the hours? Thanks!

subject: Anniversary Package Details?
body: Hi! I'm checking in tomorrow (APH-2415) and requested the anniversary package. What does this include? Champagne? Chocolate? Rose petals? This is our 10th anniversary so it's very special. Also, can we get a late checkout at 2 PM? Thank you!

subject: Iron and ironing board in room?
body: Quick question - do your rooms come with an iron and ironing board? I have important meetings during my stay (APH-2405) and need to look presentable. If not, is there laundry service?

subject: Airport shuttle available?
body: I'm arriving tomorrow for my reservation (APH-2423). Do you offer airport shuttle service? My flight lands at 3:45 PM at LAX. If not, can you recommend a reliable car service? Thank you!

subject: Birthday surprise for husband
body: Hi! Checking in tomorrow for APH-2423. It's my husband's 50th birthday and I'd love to surprise him. Can you help arrange a birthday cake to be delivered to our room? Happy to pay extra. Thank you!

subject: Concierge services available?
body: Do you have concierge services? I'm staying APH-2418 and need help booking a dinner reservation at Nobu Malibu for Saturday night. Also interested in recommendations for activities. Thanks!

subject: Wedding anniversary surprise
body: Hi! I'm checking in tomorrow (APH-2422) and it's my wife's and my 25th wedding anniversary. Can you help me surprise her? Maybe champagne and roses in the room when we arrive? Happy to pay extra. This is a big milestone! Thanks!

subject: Early check-in possible?
body: I'm arriving tomorrow around 10 AM for reservation APH-2432. Is early check-in available? Happy to pay a fee if needed. I have meetings starting at 1 PM so really need to get settled. Let me know!

subject: Excited for our stay this week!
body: Hi! Just wanted to confirm that we're checking in tomorrow for our ocean view room. We're celebrating our anniversary and can't wait to enjoy the view. See you tomorrow!

subject: Parking information needed
body: I'm checking in today for reservation APH-2419. Do you have on-site parking? What's the cost? Is it valet or self-park? I have a large SUV so want to make sure there's space. Thanks!

subject: Room cleaning preferences
body: Hello! I'm in room for APH-2443 and prefer not to have daily housekeeping. Can you please skip cleaning my room during my stay? I'll request fresh towels if needed. Thanks for helping reduce environmental impact!

subject: Temperature control in room
body: The AC in my room (APH-2421) doesn't seem to be working properly. It's very warm and I can't get it below 74 degrees. Can maintenance check it? Room temperature is really important for my sleep. Thank you!

subject: Wheelchair accessible room needed
body: Hello, I'm checking in today (confirmation APH-2417) and I need to confirm my room is wheelchair accessible. I thought I selected this when booking but don't see it mentioned in my confirmation. Can you verify? Thanks!

subject: Crib for our room?
body: Hello, we're checking in today (confirmation APH-2409) and I see I forgot to add a request for a baby crib. Our daughter is 18 months old. Is it possible to have one added to our Junior Suite? Thank you!

subject: Noise complaint - room 205
body: I'm in room for APH-2444 and there's been loud music coming from room 205 for the past hour. It's now 11:30 PM. Can someone please address this? I have an early morning meeting. Thank you.

subject: Room change request
body: I'm checking in today (APH-2445) and just realized I booked an ocean view but would actually prefer a quieter city view room on a higher floor if available. Can we swap? What would be the price difference?

subject: Pet policy question
body: Quick question - do you allow pets? I have a small dog (15 lbs) and would love to bring him for my stay March 1-5 (APH-2430). If yes, what's the pet fee? If not, can you recommend a nearby pet-friendly hotel? Thanks!

subject: Restaurant recommendations?
body: Hi! Checking in today for APH-2435. Do you have an on-site restaurant? If not, can you recommend some good restaurants within walking distance? We love seafood! Thanks!

subject: Dietary restrictions for breakfast
body: Hi! We're checking in tomorrow (confirmation APH-2446). My husband has a severe gluten allergy. Do you have gluten-free options for breakfast? Also need to avoid cross-contamination. Thanks!

subject: Gym and pool hours?
body: Hi, checking in today (APH-2433). What are your gym and pool hours? Also, do you have yoga mats available? Looking forward to working out during my stay. Thanks!

subject: Loyalty points not showing
body: I'm a Gold member and just checked in yesterday (APH-2444) but I don't see the points credited to my account yet. Also, I should be getting complimentary breakfast as a Gold member but the front desk said that's not included. Can you clarify your loyalty benefits?

subject: Need to extend my stay
body: Hi there, I'm currently checked in (APH-2416) and need to extend my checkout from March 4th to March 6th. Is my Junior Suite available for those extra nights? Let me know the rate. Thanks!

subject: URGENT: Wrong room type booked!
body: I just checked my confirmation APH-2426 and it shows Ocean View King, but I specifically booked an Executive Suite with separate living area for business meetings. This is unacceptable - I need the suite I originally booked. Please fix this immediately or I'll need to cancel.

subject: Booked ocean view but confirmation shows city view!
body: I'm very upset. I specifically paid extra for an ocean view room but my confirmation APH-2421 shows a Deluxe King which I know is a city view room. I booked this for my mother's 70th birthday and the ocean view was the whole point. Fix this or issue a full refund!

subject: Business center and printing
body: I'm checked in currently (APH-2436) and need to print some documents for a meeting. Do you have a business center? What are the hours? Is there a charge for printing? Thanks!

subject: Charged wrong amount!
body: I was just charged $538 for my reservation APH-2427, but when I booked it showed $358 total. That's nearly $200 more! I want an explanation and a refund of the overcharge immediately. This is fraud!

subject: Never received confirmation email
body: I booked a room through Booking.com but never received a confirmation email. My booking reference is APH-2442. Can you resend it? I'm worried my reservation didn't go through properly. I'm currently checked in but want the confirmation for my records.

subject: Anniversary flowers delivered?
body: Hi! I had a bouquet of red roses delivered to room for APH-2439 yesterday but my wife says they never arrived. Can you check if they were delivered? Order was from ProFlowers. Thank you!

subject: Need to cancel - full refund expected
body: I need to cancel my current reservation APH-2431 and check out early due to a family emergency. I know I'm already checked in but this is urgent. I booked this 2 weeks ago and expect a refund for the remaining nights. Can you process this today?

subject: I NEVER made this reservation!
body: I just got a charge for $1,276 for confirmation APH-2443 but I NEVER made this reservation! This must be fraud or identity theft. I've never even heard of your hotel. Cancel this immediately and refund my card. I'm reporting this to my bank as unauthorized.

subject: Already cancelled but still charged!
body: I cancelled my reservation APH-2322 over a week ago on February 24th and received a cancellation confirmation email. Now I see I was still charged $498! I want my money back immediately. I have proof I cancelled within the free cancellation window.

subject: Where is my refund for no-show?
body: I couldn't make my reservation on March 1st (APH-2323) due to a flight cancellation. I called the hotel that day and was told I'd get a refund because of the circumstances. It's been 2 days and I still don't see the $189 refund. When will I receive it?

subject: Price on Expedia is $100 cheaper!
body: I just noticed that the same Junior Suite for the same dates (March 2-7) is listed on Expedia for $299/night but I paid $399/night on your direct website (APH-2448). Don't you have a best rate guarantee? I want the $500 difference refunded or I'm canceling and rebooking on Expedia.

subject: Extra pillows please
body: Could I get 2 extra pillows delivered to my room? I'm in APH-2414 and the pillows provided are too soft for me. Firm pillows preferred. Thanks so much!

subject: Paid for suite, confirmation shows standard room
body: This is completely unacceptable. I paid $1,995 for a Junior Suite (APH-2447) for 5 nights, but now I'm looking at my confirmation and it says Standard King room. I specifically needed the suite for the extra space. Either honor my suite booking or refund me the difference immediately.

subject: Checkout time confirmation
body: Hi, I'm currently checked in (APH-2448) and checking out on March 7. Just want to confirm checkout is at 11 AM. Is late checkout available? Would love to stay until 1 PM if possible. Thank you!

subject: Room key not working
body: My room key for APH-2432 has stopped working - I've tried it 5 times and the door won't open. I'm standing outside my room now. Can you reactivate it or should I come to the front desk? Thanks!

subject: Coffee maker not working
body: Good morning! The coffee maker in my room (APH-2451) isn't working. I really need my morning coffee! Can you send someone to fix it or bring a new one? Thanks!

subject: Mini bar charges
body: I'm checked in currently (APH-2453) and noticed the mini bar in my room. Are these automatically charged to the room? What are the prices? Just want to know before I use anything. Thanks!

subject: Lost item - black laptop charger
body: Hi, I checked out yesterday from APH-2454 and realized I left my black MacBook Pro charger in the room. Has it been turned in to lost and found? Can you ship it to me if found? Happy to pay shipping. Thanks!

subject: Taxi service to LAX
body: Hi, I'm checking out tomorrow morning at 6 AM (APH-2502) and need a reliable taxi to LAX. Can you arrange this? My flight is at 9 AM so I need to leave by 6:15 AM. Thank you!
